document: Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security (India - Row 8)

sections.heading: Reference is drawn to Point no. 3 on "Applicability" of Guidelines on Information and
sections.summary: This section references Point 3 on 'Applicability' of the Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security for Insurers, stating that the guidelines apply to all insurers regulated by the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI).

requirements.text: this guidelines document is applicable to all insurers regulated by Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI)

sections.source_quote: 1. Reference is drawn to Point no. 3 on "Applicability" of Guidelines on Information and Cyber Security for Insurers dated 07.04.2017 read as "this guidelines document is applicable to all insurers regulated by Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI)."

sections.heading: It has been decided by the Authority to extend the applicability of said guidelines to all
sections.summary: This section states that the Authority has decided to extend the applicability of the guidelines to all Insurance Intermediaries with immediate effect.

requirements.text: It has been decided by the Authority to extend the applicability of said guidelines to all Insurance Intermediaries with immediate effect.

sections.source_quote: 2. It has been decided by the Authority to extend the applicability of said guidelines to all Insurance Intermediaries with immediate effect.
